data.title: Investigation into Navan, Inc. for securities law violations due to misleading information (NASDAQ: NAVN). Contact Edelson Lechtzin LLP with losses.
data.description: An investigation into potential violations of federal securities laws regarding Navan, Inc. (NASDAQ: NAVN) is being conducted by Edelson Lechtzin LLP, a law firm based in Newtown, Pennsylvania. This investigation stems from allegations suggesting that Navan may have provided misleading business information to investors. The probe is centered on assessing any breaches of regulations aimed at safeguarding investors and maintaining market integrity. Navan's stock performance and public disclosures are under scrutiny as part of this investigation. The law firm is focused on determining the extent of any potential wrongdoing that could impact shareholders and the investing public.

data.title: USA Compression Partners LP files 2025 annual report on Form 10-K with the SEC and on its website.
data.description: USA Compression Partners, LP (NYSE: USAC) based in Dallas, announced the submission of its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The report can be accessed on USA Compression's website (www.usacompression.com) under Investor Relations > Financials-SEC Filings, and on the SEC's website at sec.gov. This provides interested parties with comprehensive information regarding the company's financial performance and outlook.

data.title: Canfor to record $321M asset write-down, $215M in lumber segment, $106M in pulp and paper segment.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 17, 2026, Canfor Corporation disclosed its plans to document a non-cash asset write-down and impairment charge of roughly $321 million in its financial report for the fourth quarter of 2025. Within this sum, approximately $215 million is associated with the company's lumber sector, while around $106 million pertains to its pulp and paper division.

data.title: Article raises concern over insider benefits and limitations on competing offers for MASI, KW, VRME, BKKT shareholders. Contact firm for free legal advice.
data.description: Those with insider access could potentially receive significant monetary perks that regular shareholders do not have access to. The planned deals may include conditions that restrict the possibility of better competitive bids. Shareholders are advised to get in touch with the company to talk about their rights and choices at zero expense.

data.title: Future Mineral's AGM elects nominees as directors, 25.97% of shares represented at Meeting. TSX: FMR.
data.description: In Toronto on February 17, 2026, Future Mineral Resources Inc. (TSX: FMR) announced that the nominees outlined in the January 6, 2026 management information circular for the 2025 Annual and Special Shareholders Meeting were voted in as directors of the Company. A notable 25.97% of the total issued and outstanding shares were represented at the Meeting in accordance with Toronto Stock Exchange regulations.

data.title: Legal Defense Fund challenges racially discriminatory voting map in DeSoto County, Mississippi. Trial began with support from ACLU and Harvard Law.
data.description: In the federal court of the Northern District of Mississippi, the trial commenced in the case of Harris v. DeSoto County today. The Legal Defense Fund (LDF) is challenging a racially discriminatory electoral map in DeSoto County. This lawsuit was filed in September 2024 by LDF, in collaboration with the Election Law Clinic at Harvard Law School, the ACLU of Mississippi, and voting rights attorney Amir Badat. The lawsuit represents Delta Sigma Theta Sorority, Inc., DeSoto County NAACP, and two individual DeSoto County residents.

data.title: Camden Property Trust prices $600 million 4.900% senior unsecured notes due 2036 at 99.936% of par value.
data.description: Houston-based real estate company, Camden Property Trust, has disclosed the pricing of $600 million in senior unsecured notes through an existing shelf registration. The 10-year notes were sold at 99.936% of their par value, carrying a 4.900% coupon. Interest payments on these notes will occur semi-annually on February 28 and August 28, starting from August 28, 2026, up until the maturity date on February 28, 2036. Camden anticipates utilizing the net proceeds from this offering for unspecified purposes.

data.title: Constellation Software Inc. (TSX:CSU) will hold Q4 conference call on March 10, 2026 at 8:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, Toronto-based Constellation Software Inc. (TSX:CSU) revealed plans to hold a conference call and live audio webcast concerning its fourth quarter results. The event is scheduled for March 10, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET. This update was shared by the company without any further details being provided.

data.description: Those with inside knowledge could potentially gain significant financial advantages that regular shareholders cannot access. The suggested deals might include conditions that restrict better rival bids. Shareholders are urged to reach out to the company to explore their entitlements and choices without incurring any expenses.

data.title: David Tepper's Appaloosa boosts Micron stake by 250% to 1.5M shares, worth over $428M, trims Nvidia and Amazon.
data.description: Financier David Tepper, the creator of Appaloosa Management, made notable moves in his portfolio by cashing in on Chinese technology and certain Mag 7 companies, while increasing his stake in the semiconductor industry. Tepper's Appaloosa displayed a strong interest in Micron Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MU), with a remarkable 250% boost in Micron shares. The filing disclosed a precise addition of 1,000,000 Micron shares during the quarter, resulting in a total holding of 1.5 million shares worth exceeding $428 million. Tepper's strategic approach signifies a significant shift towards... Complete details accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Agnico Eagle invests in Maple Gold Mines Ltd by acquiring 662,780 common shares at C$2.45 per share.
data.description: Agnico Eagle Mines Limited (NYSE: AEM, TSX: AEM) based in Toronto revealed on February 17, 2026, its recent acquisition of 662,780 common shares of Maple Gold Mines Ltd. (TSXV: MGM) at a rate of C$2.45 per Common Share.

data.title: Teck Resources to present at BMO conference on Feb. 23, 2026 at 1:30 p.m. Eastern/10:30 a.m. Pacific time. CEO to discuss strategy and financial outlook.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 17, 2026, Teck Resources Limited (TSX: TECK.A, TECK.B, NYSE: TECK) announces that their President and CEO, Jonathan Price, is scheduled to speak at the BMO Global Metals, Mining & Critical Minerals conference on February 23, 2026, at 1:30 p.m. Eastern/10:30 a.m. Pacific time. The presentation will cover company strategy, financial performance, and business units' outlook.

data.title: Dorchester Minerals, L.P. adds A. Troy Sturrock to board of managers to replace C.W. “Bill” Russell after his death.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, Dorchester Minerals, L.P. revealed that A. Troy Sturrock has been assigned to the board of managers of the general partner of their general partner as an independent manager and advisory committee member starting from February 11, 2026. This appointment was made to replace C.W. “Bill” Russell, who passed away. Dorchester Minerals, L.P. is listed on the NASDAQ as DMLP.

data.title: Buenaventura reported 4Q25 results: 61.43% increase in gold production at El Brocal to 5,862 ounces.
data.description: LIMA, Peru--Compañía de Minas Buenaventura S.A.A. (“Buenaventura” or “the Company”) revealed its 4Q25 performance results for production and sales volume. As Peru’s largest publicly-traded precious metals mining firm, Buenaventura shared the following production figures in gold ounces: El Brocal saw a 61.43% increase, producing 5,862 ounces in the final quarter of 2025 and 21,102 ounces for the full year. Orcopampa, on the other hand, achieved 100% production, reaching 15,754 ounces during the same period. The company also provided production guidance for the year ending December 31, 2026, estimating a range of 15.0k to 17.0k ounces for El Brocal.

data.title: Liftoff Mobile, Inc. has submitted a draft S-1 registration statement for IPO to SEC. Date: Feb. 17, 2026. #IPO #LiftoffMobile
data.description: In Redwood City, California, on February 17, 2026, Liftoff Mobile, Inc. revealed that it has quietly filed a preliminary registration statement on Form S-1 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for its potential initial public offering. The company has not disclosed the specific details of the offering, such as the number of shares to be issued or the expected price range. The submission marks a significant step in Liftoff Mobile's journey towards becoming a publicly traded company, providing an opportunity for investors to participate in the company's growth and success.

data.title: Law firm investigating potential violations by Capital One Financial Corporation; investors with substantial losses urged to contact.
data.description: An investigation is being conducted by Edelson Lechtzin LLP in Newtown, Pennsylvania, concerning potential breaches of federal securities laws by Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE: COF) on February 17, 2026. The company is accused of engaging in deceptive business practices that may have violated securities regulations.

data.title: Airgain reports granting inducement awards under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4) on Feb 15, 2026 to new employees.
data.description: In San Diego, Airgain, Inc. (NASDAQ: AIRG), a top provider of advanced wireless connectivity solutions, disclosed the granting of inducement awards to fresh recruits. This announcement was made on February 15, 2026, under Airgain’s 2021 Employment Inducement Incentive Award Plan. The plan aims to offer equity awards to new hires as motivation to come aboard the company. The exact number of employees who received these awards was not specified in the announcement.

data.title: ATS will participate in Raymond James Institutional Investors Conference on March 3, 2026, with CEO and CFO present. Webcast available.
data.description: ATS Corporation (TSX: ATS) (NYSE: ATS) based in Cambridge, Ontario, released information that its CEO, Doug Wright, and Interim CFO, Anne Cybulski, will be attending the Raymond James Institutional Investors Conference in Orlando, FL on March 3, 2026. The Company is set to hold a fireside chat at 2:15 p.m. (ET) during the event. Those interested can access a webcast of the live session via the Investor Relations site at https://investors.atsau.

data.title: Enverus introduces Minerals Marketplace for mineral trade, offering off-market deals with zero fees.
data.description: Enverus, a prominent energy SaaS and analytics platform based in Austin, Texas, disclosed the introduction of Enverus Minerals Marketplace on February 17, 2026. This novel data-driven platform enables buyers and sellers to access exclusive off-market deals directly without incurring any transaction fees. This initiative marks a significant shift in the energy industry, promising enhanced efficiency for market participants.
